nodes.text: You ask him something you've been holding onto. Something you weren't sure he'd answer.

nodes.speaker: You
nodes.text: Do you actually care what happens to me, or is this just a job?
He doesn't answer right away. The city moves past the window. You wait.

nodes.speaker: The Driver
nodes.text: If it were just a job, I would have stopped taking your calls six months ago. The hours don't make sense. The money doesn't cover it. I'm still here.
He's never said that many words at once. Not to you. Not to anyone, you suspect.

nodes.speaker: The Driver
nodes.text: Don't make a thing of it.
